trickyParts: Envoy /v1/interests/ (list all) returns 404 with 'nats: invalid key' — individual session lookups work fine
OpenCode serve message API uses /session/:id/message (not /messages) and requires ?directory= parameter
Cross-mode cleanup removes the entire Envoy interest entry, not just selective topics
AC2 required manual subscription because no implement worker with PR subscription was running — the delivery path is identical
AC5 requires careful sequencing: dispatch fresh worker (has stored envoyTopics), remove via Envoy API (not cross-mode cleanup which clears stored topics), then resume
deviations: Used architect session for AC1 instead of plan worker — same subscription mechanism, different mode name
Used test-mode worker for AC4 instead of implement-mode — avoids conflict with running implement worker (self)
AC2 used manual subscription instead of self-subscription — no implement worker with PR sub existed
